positive: A mystical, detailed illustration of stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna nestled amongst glowing celestial constellations. The central focus is a majestic, stylized moon orchid surrounded by glowing deep-sea jellyfish forms and abstract starburst motes. The composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, featuring strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient cosmic void background. Use a palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric teal, and soft amethyst purples. The style must be highly graphic, vector-art inspired, and perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Emphasis on sharp edges, high contrast, and clean delineation, emphasizing magical, natural elements.
